name: Dispel Magic
description: Choose a creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends; for a higher-level spell, make an ability check with your spellcasting ability (DC 10 + that spell's level) to end it. Engine: there is no dispellable on-board magic (enemy buffs/effects) yet (US-117), so this is descriptive.
